MAT_1_1: This is the record of the genealogy of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.
MAT_1_2: Abraham was the father of Isaac, Isaac the father of Jacob, Jacob the father of Judah and his brothers,
MAT_1_3: Judah the father of Perez and Zerah (by Tamar), Perez the father of Hezron, Hezron the father of Ram,
JHN_3_16: For this is the way God loved the world: He gave his one and only Son, so that everyone who believes in him will not perish but have eternal life.
ROM_1_1: From Paul, a slave of Christ Jesus, called to be an apostle, set apart for the gospel of God.
1CO_13_4: Love is patient, love is kind, it is not envious. Love does not brag, it is not puffed up.
